untranslatable_reason: Signal references specific table-based selection criteria (Table 23.1, 23.2, 23.3) and 'yearly low' proximity that cannot be expressed without 52-week low indicator. Pattern identification guidelines and measure rule price targets are qualitative and require manual interpretation. Source text fragment does not provide quantifiable exit logic or specific parameter values.
translation_notes: Approximated entry conditions using available candle properties: tall lower_wick (dragonfly characteristic), proximity to yearly low via price_pos_20 < 0.33 (within third of range low), and above-average candle height via range > atr_14. Exit uses measure rule concept as reversal beyond candle extremes. Stop-loss and hold period set to reasonable defaults (2% and 20 days) as book defers specifics to reader analysis. Direction set to CONTEXT_DEPENDENT per signal specification.
